stemHtml: The requirements of the take-off net flight path for a Class A aeroplane assume…

options.a: the failure of two engines of a three-engined or four-engined aeroplane at V<sub>EF</sub>.
options.b: the failure of any engine of a multi-engined aeroplane at V<sub>EF</sub>.
options.c: the failure of any engine of a multi-engined aeroplane at V<sub>R</sub>.
options.d: the failure of the critical engine of a multi-engined aeroplane at V<sub>EF</sub>.
